description_long: This kiosk is a rectangular, modern structure set atop a large, patterned platform that extends well beyond the building's footprint. The kiosk features a bold, geometric facade with alternating black, white, and gold panels, creating a striking visual contrast. The roof is flat and seamlessly integrated with the rest of the structure, while the sides display a mix of solid and patterned surfaces. The front of the kiosk appears to have a recessed entryway, possibly with a service window or counter, and the overall design is minimalist with sharp, clean lines. There are no visible windows or signage, emphasizing the geometric motif. The platform beneath the kiosk is textured with a grid-like pattern, providing both visual interest and a sense of permanence.
description: A modern, rectangular kiosk with bold black, white, and gold geometric panels, set on a large patterned platform. The design is minimalist and striking, with a flat roof and no visible windows or signage.
description_view_0: The kiosk is seen from the front, showing the main facade with its geometric paneling and a recessed entryway, all atop a large patterned platform.
description_view_1: This view shows the side of the kiosk, highlighting the alternating black and white panels and the full extent of the patterned platform.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the elongated rectangular shape of the kiosk and the continuous geometric motif, with no visible entry or windows.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays the bold diagonal paneling and the depth of the platform, with no visible openings.
attribute_roof_design: flat roof, seamless, matching geometric pattern, no overhangs or decorative elements
